text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sometime after the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Assistant Director
text_block_list.text: The BNW trio is here! Thank you for coming!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for having us. We're
delighted to be here.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! This place is nice—and huge! I love it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Can it, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The members of BNW have been chosen to be
promotional representatives for a car commercial
and have come to film an ad.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So to summarize, the advertisement will feature
clips of us racing overlaid with three cars of
different colors.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And there will also be shots of us having fun in a
car and saying things in unison...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Looks like this is gonna take a while.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. We should be fully prepared to ensure
the shoot runs smoothly!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Master your top speed... Master your top speed...
Do you think it'd be better if I said it with more
intensity?

text_block_list.name: Assistant Director
text_block_list.text: Please get ready! We'll be relocating soon!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! I-I've got ants in my pants! C-c-can I go
for a quick run?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea. I'll join you. A light jog is
always good for dispelling nerves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You have cotton in your ears? We're about to go.
You two need to chill.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Can you blame us?! How are you so calm right
now anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: This is no different from any other day.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? This is nothing like a day at
school!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's not what I'm saying.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everything feels normal 'cause you two are
around, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez! Would you cool it? C'mon, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Filming finishes without a hitch, and the ad
garners high praise thanks to the natural and fun
vibes the three friendly rivals bring to it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nowhere near as nerve-racking as waiting
for a race to start.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, I get that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try practicing our lines? I keep
feeling as though I'll fumble them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Master your top speed.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Race towards tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seize victory.

text_block_list.name: BNW
text_block_list.text: A brand new world.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! We pulled it off! We really did it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't know... Can we do that one more time,
please?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They start again, and the filming crew manages to
get behind-the-scenes footage of BNW practicing
their lines fastidiously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nowhere near as nerve-racking as waiting
for a race to start.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, I get that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try practicing our lines? I keep
feeling as though I'll fumble them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their practice pays off, and once they wrap up
the indoor scenes, filming moves outdoors.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So all we've gotta do here is run as fast as we can,
right?

text_block_list.name: Assistant Director
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Give it your all, like it's one of your
mesmerizing battles in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okie-dokie! You got it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Turf course, 2,500 meters, right-handed. Ah,
I see—it's just like the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I certainly can't lose now, especially against
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, a rematch, is it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, even if this is just for an ad, I'm not gonna
lose.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not against you guys.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: And... ACTION!

text_block_list.name: BNW
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Multiple cameras chase after them as they
reenact their legendary race in all its fervent
glory.
